Title: Neon Sunset Cityscape T-Shirt
Description:
Capture the vibrant energy of urban nightlife with this striking neon cityscape design. Featuring a stylized skyline bathed in the warm glow of a sunset, this tee brings a retro, synthwave aesthetic to your wardrobe.

  • Vivid Design: The artwork showcases towering buildings highlighted by brilliant neon signs (cyan, magenta, and electric blue), set against a dramatic gradient of orange and yellow.
  • Comfortable Fit: Printed on a high-quality, soft-feel fabric perfect for all-day comfort, making it ideal for casual outings or festival wear.
  • Style Statement: Perfect for enthusiasts of synthwave, vaporwave, retro futurism, or abstract urban art. It makes a unique and eye-catching gift for any music lover or design enthusiast.

The durable print ensures the neon colors remain bright and vivid, wash after wash.
